element_description: Card grid container (ul element) holding the promotional campaign cards
computed_style_change: display: grid vs block; grid-template-columns: 368px 368px 368px vs none; column-gap: 16px vs normal
difference: The original card list uses a CSS Grid layout with three equal 368px columns and 16px gaps, creating a uniform card grid with visible spacing between cards. The migrated version uses block display with no grid template, resulting in the cards being arranged differently. The original shows 2 cards side by side occupying part of the container, while the migrated shows 3 cards spanning the full width.

element_description: First campaign card (image on top, text with heading and CTA button below)
computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; flex-direction: column vs row; border-radius: 8px vs 0px; background-color: rgb(251,177,117) vs transparent
difference: The original first card uses vertical flex layout (flex-direction: column) with 8px rounded corners on all sides. The migrated version uses block display with no rounded corners. The card corners are visibly square in the migrated version compared to the smooth rounded appearance in the original. Both cards show an orange/peach background for the text area, but the original card has a unified rounded container while the migrated card lacks this visual containment.

element_description: First card text content area with heading, description, and CTA button
difference: The text content area in the first card has no top padding in the migrated version (original: 20px). The heading text sits closer to the top edge of the text area in the migrated card. The bottom padding is also larger in the migrated version (32px vs 20px), creating more space below the CTA button.

element_description: Second campaign card (image on top, text with heading and CTA button below)
computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; flex-direction: column vs row; border-radius: 8px vs 0px
difference: The original second card has vertical flex layout with 8px rounded corners. The migrated version has block display with square corners. The rounded card appearance is missing in the migrated version.
The second card's text content area has no top padding in the migrated version (original: 20px) and increased bottom padding (32px vs 20px). The heading sits closer to the text area boundary.
